env.description: Upstash Redis REST URL for persistent state (from Vercel Marketplace or Upstash console)
Upstash Redis REST token (from Vercel Marketplace or Upstash console)
Random 32+ character secret used to encrypt session cookies (generate with: openssl rand -hex 32)
Vercel AI Gateway API key for LLM access (enable AI Gateway in your Vercel project settings)
